articles.title: NASDAQ TIGHTENS SCRUTINY OF CRYPTO TREASURY RAISES
articles.summary: Nasdaq is increasing oversight of U.S.-listed firms raising capital to buy crypto, now requiring shareholder votes and greater disclosures, with potential suspension or delisting for noncompliance. The move follows an increase in digital asset treasury (DAT) raises, with 154 firms announcing $98.4B in planned crypto purchases this year. The crackdown adds new hurdles for companies mirroring Strategy and BitMine's balance sheet playbooks, potentially slowing deal timelines.

articles.title: 'NFTS TURNED OUT TO BE A FAD,' SAYS KEVIN O'LEARY
TEMPO: A PAYMENTS CHAIN FROM STRIPE AND PARADIGM
articles.summary: Stripe and Paradigm have announced Tempo, a new payments-first blockchain specifically designed for stablecoins and real-world payments infrastructure that features major enterprise design partners, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Shopify, Visa, and Deutsche Bank. The blockchain offers 100,000+ TPS throughput with sub-second finality, EVM compatibility, and native support for payments and gas fees in any stablecoin through an enshrined AMM, along with payments-optimized UX features like dedicated payment lanes and memos. Tempo aims to bring traditional payment use cases onchain, including global payouts, payroll, remittances, and microtransactions, while maintaining principles of decentralization and stablecoin neutrality through an independent validator network.

articles.title: FIREBLOCKS LAUNCHES STABLECOIN PAYMENTS NETWORK
articles.summary: Fireblocks has launched an enterprise-grade stablecoin network to help financial firms move USD-pegged tokens and build payment products, with Circle, Bridge, Zerohash, and Yellow Card among 40 participants. The network introduces unified APIs and workflows to streamline stablecoin transactions across providers, blockchains, and fiat rails, positioning Fireblocks as core infrastructure for global payments. With stablecoin markets projected to reach trillions, the firm is targeting significant institutional demand while expanding services in emerging markets like those in Africa.

articles.title: WHY HYPE DATS CAN WIN
articles.summary: Digital Asset Treasury companies holding Hyperliquid's HYPE token possess a unique competitive advantage in the treasury company space through their ability to generate substantial yield via HIP-3, Hyperliquid's exchange infrastructure sharing mechanism. While BTC DATs like MicroStrategy rely primarily on brand and capital raising ability, and ETH/SOL DATs struggle with low staking yields of only 2-5%, HYPE DATs can potentially earn ~24% APY by staking tokens with exchanges built on Hyperliquid infrastructure and sharing in their trading fees. However, the strategy requires careful selection of exchanges to back since each will likely only accept around 1 million HYPE tokens, forcing HYPE DATs to make strategic bets on which exchanges will succeed in capturing significant trading volume.

articles.title: SEPTEMBER YIELD FARMING PLAYBOOK
articles.summary: There are five high-yield DeFi strategies ranging from 12% to 42.5% APR, including single-sided Bitcoin exposure through GammaSwap Labs at 15% APY with minimal drawdown, and a complex HYPE token strategy using HyperEVM and Pendle that delivers 42.5% APR through leveraged looping. The strategies span various protocols and assets, from delta-neutral stablecoin vaults earning 12% APR to sophisticated USDe staking and looping strategies on Ethena Labs and Dolomite that can generate over 40% APR plus additional token rewards. Most strategies involve leverage, looping, or complex multi-protocol interactions to amplify returns, with associated risks including liquidation exposure and interest rate volatility that require active monitoring.

articles.title: TRADING THE METAGAME: IN PURSUIT OF NARRATIVES
articles.summary: The cryptocurrency market has fundamentally shifted from valuing pure technology to prioritizing narrative and actual user adoption, with many venture-backed infrastructure projects failing because they lack compelling stories or real usage. Pump Fun's success revealed that most token buyers simply want price appreciation rather than technological innovation, exposing how previous cycles were sustained by speculation on unused blockchains rather than genuine utility. Market capitalizations are built on public trust and consumer psychology, requiring projects to either develop better tokenomics that resemble equity or eliminate tokens altogether. As crypto markets become more accessible to mainstream users, successful projects must understand that "normies" interpret value through viral narratives and social proof rather than technical specifications, making storytelling as crucial as the underlying technology.

articles.title: MONETIZING ULTRA-NICHE KNOWLEDGE
articles.summary: Prediction markets represent the first system capable of making ultra-niche knowledge "liquid," allowing individuals with highly specific expertise to directly monetize information that previously had no clear economic value. Unlike traditional knowledge monetization methods that require building newsletters or convincing investors, prediction markets enable immediate trading on obscure insights, fundamentally changing the incentive structure around curiosity and specialized knowledge. This creates a dual benefit: it rewards individuals for pursuing seemingly useless interests while simultaneously making markets more efficient by incorporating diverse, granular information that was previously trapped in people's heads. The system transforms the "long tail" of human knowledge into valuable market signals, potentially creating the most efficient knowledge aggregation mechanism humans have developed.

articles.title: PUBLIC COMPANIES NOW HOLD OVER 1M BITCOIN
articles.summary: Public firms collectively hold more than 1 million BTC, worth ~$111B, as Bitcoin treasury strategies accelerate.

articles.title: CRYPTO MARKET POSITIONING
articles.summary: Crypto market positioning as of September shows a notable divergence between Bitcoin and Ethereum, with BTC spot positioning heavily long while ETH remains relatively neutral, though BTC's options put-call skew suggests underlying defensive sentiment.

articles.title: ETHEREUM INTEROPERABILITY LAYER
articles.summary: The Ethereum Interop Layer (EIL) is a trustless cross-rollup interoperability solution designed specifically for Ethereum's L2 ecosystem that leverages their shared trust root to eliminate the need for trusted intermediaries.

articles.title: COINBASE INCREASES LEVERAGE TO 50X ON INTERNATIONAL PERPS
articles.summary: Perpetual futures on Coinbase's international exchange have increased from a maximum of 20x leverage to 50x.
